extra.reason: Fixed release workflow to pack npm tarballs into a root-level PACK_DIR and added release metadata regression coverage; validation passed: focused release metadata test, root pack path reproduction, pnpm run release:verify, pnpm run check.

Completed npm first publish and trusted publisher setup for all eight @zigrivers/surface packages: GitHub Actions repo zigrivers/surface, workflow release.yml, environment npm-release, publish permission.

Completed Homebrew tap and formula validation. Created public tap zigrivers/homebrew-surface, added Formula/surface.rb with npm tarball URL and SHA256, fixed npm same-day install and libexec install layout, pushed tap, validated: ruby -c, brew tap, brew install --build-from-source zigrivers/surface/surface, brew test zigrivers/surface/surface, brew audit --new --formula zigrivers/surface/surface.
Fixed CLI version output to read package metadata; verified clean npm install and Homebrew install both report 0.1.1.

Release readiness verified for v0.1.1: pnpm run check passed, pnpm run release:verify passed, all eight npm packages visible at 0.1.1, clean npm install reports 0.1.1, Homebrew formula install/test/audit passed, no v* tags or GitHub releases exist yet, release workflow has zero runs.
